meta.phase-name: Inheritance-Level Feature and Space View Refactor

phase-summary.outcome: Removed Model Space section controls, stopped tree checkbox selection UX, and switched to automatic inheritance-chain model-space overlays; Features panel is now split by inheritance levels (base/class).

file.description: Refactored model overlay source and feature panel grouping by schema chain.

tests.test: TypeScript typecheck passes after inheritance grouping and control removals.
